Name: 18650 Battery Holder – 1 Cell
Purpose: Single cell battery holder to safely house the power supply unit consisting of 3 rechargeable 18650 batteries. I had to buy 3 cause they need to be connected to parallel and all the 3s cases I could find was pre-wired into series,which makes the voltage exceed.

Name: TP4056 Charging Module
Purpose: For charging the rechargable Batteries via USB

Name: DC-DC Boost Module XL6009
Purpose: To maintain a stable voltage of 5v from the TP4056 to the whole system.

Name: 1000UF 16v Capacitor
Purpose: To put across the vcc and gnd of the led strips to ensure smooth power supply

Name: Soldering iron stand
Purpose: To hold the soldering iron safely

Name: Soldering Iron
Purpose: To make permanent electrical joints after finalising the prototype.

Name: 8-bit WS2812B 5050 RGB LED
Purpose: To give a visualisation of the datas coming from the sensors. Where green will mean low stress, yellow is mid-level and red will indicate peak stress level.LED strips are being used to use them like bar charts,more lit leds mean higher sensor data.

Name: Galvanic Skin Response GSR Sensor
Purpose: To measure the amount of sweating from the subject to determine his stress level

Name: Esp-32 wroom
Purpose: The brain of the whole project. This board will take readings from the GSR and pulse sensor and then process the data and determine whether or not the person is lying.

Name: MAX30105 Particle Optical Sensor Photodetectors Oximeter Module
Purpose: To measure pulse rate and oxygen saturation. Buying a clone version for cost optimisation, the original sparkfun model costs double.
